name: gamebet
description: A8 esports aggregator — frontend replica + local backend

scripts.test: npm run check:boundaries && npm run test:api-contract && npm run test:catalog-smoke && npm run check:rds-schema --prefix server/backend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run test --prefix client/web
scripts.test:catalog-smoke: node packages/shared/catalog/market_catalog_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/catalog/game_catalog_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/im_parse_smoke.test.mjs && node packages/shared/time/match_time_smoke.test.mjs && node server/storage/paths_smoke.test.mjs && vitest run server/db/order_link_filter.test.mjs server/db/order_changmen_bet.test.mjs
